title: ramium australe
intro: Ranium australe, also known as the Australian box or prickly box, is a native Australian plant belonging to the family Cunoniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ramium australe include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, while also providing relief from fever and coughs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
